DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) STEFAN CALIZ (DIRECTOR OF PROPERTY MANAGER) FILED BY DEFENDANT HANFORD FREUND & COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2023 - TRANSFERRED FORTHWITH TO BE HEARD IN DEPT 611 BEFORE JUDGE KARNOW TO JUN-27-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 611. PLAINTIFF ABEL MALDONADO IS PRESENT.
